TextENGNew: Indeed, today is the informal gathering of the Angel Mort Imperial Guard!
changeReason: Old translation rendered 親衛隊 as 'superfans' but the term literally means 'Imperial Guard/Praetorian Guard'; new translation preserves the group's self-aggrandizing military-style name.

TextENGNew: W-w-we would nyever come to this pool for indecent reasons...!@k@r@vS23/00/VTH_otaB1002.This is spiritual training -- learning to endure the sight of stimulating swimsuits so that we won't give in to desire when we see Angel Mort uniforms...!!
Hah hah, just looking at these gals in their swimsuits, the V-angle tilt is already past the critical point!
changeReason: Old says 'approaching the critical point' while JPN Ｋ点越え means 'past/beyond the K-point' — small difference in degree within the same comedic innuendo context.

TextENGNew: Mmm?! That's Lady Rena Ryuugu over there!@k@r@vS23/00/VTH_otaA1003.And isn't that Lady Satoko and Lady Rika as well!!
"H-hau...! Being called 'Lady' makes it sound kind of...indecent somehow...@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1057. I wonder why, why...!"
changeReason: Old translation rendered いかがわしい as 'wrong' but the word specifically means 'indecent/dubious'; new translation's 'indecent' better captures Rena's feeling about being called 'Lady.'

TextENGNew: "I had no idea there were so many Angel Mort superfans...@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1049. Just how many of them showed up today?"
"Hoo hoo hoo! Today's swimsuit appreciation gathering -- I mean, social event -- has attracted a whopping fifty attendees~!!"
changeReason: New translation adds the self-correction 'I mean, social event' (もとい in the Japanese) where the otaku accidentally reveals the real purpose before correcting himself; old translation omitted this.

TextENGNew: "...I feel like this is even more people than when we rallied everyone to rescue Satoko."
"I-I'm not quite sure what you mean by that, but this large turnout is extremely convenient for us!!"
"E-excuse me, everyone! We could really use your help!!@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1059. Um, how do I explain this... uhh... hmm~...!"
"...Meep... Keiichi stole all of our navy-blue school swimsuits."
changeReason: New translation includes the color descriptor 紺色 (navy-blue) for the school swimsuits, which was omitted in the original translation.

TextENGNew: ""Wh-wh-what the meow!?!""

"...Keiichi stuffed those stolen school swimsuits inside his trunks and is running around with them.@k@vS23/05/VTH_rika1055. Because of him, we can't do our swimsuit costume change for the readers..."

"C-c-comrades, this is unforgivable!!@|@y@k@vS23/00/VTH_otaA1006. To admire is lawful! To steal is criminal! And moe needs no sermon!!@|@y@k@vS23/00/VTH_otaA1007. Even if heaven permits sabotaging Lady Rika and Lady Satoko's tearfully beautiful fan-service scene and reducing the number of precious swimsuit moments, the great and noble audience will never stand for it!!@|@y@k@vS23/00/VTH_otaA1008. And we ourselves feel even more strongly about this!!!"
changeReason: Japanese uses the idiom 釈迦に説法 (preaching to Buddha/preaching to the choir); new translation's 'moe needs no sermon' better captures this than old's 'I needn't explain moe to you.' Also, the fan-service line about 感涙はらはら (tears of emotion) is rendered differently.

TextENGNew: "W-we, the Angel Mort Imperial Guard, will nyever allow such a thing!!"
changeReason: Consistent with MID 153144: 親衛隊 rendered as 'Imperial Guard' instead of 'superfans.'

TextENGNew: "H-hau... I-I guess that works...@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1061. ...So then, will you all help us catch Keiichi-kun...?"
""YEAAAAAAAAH!!!""

"Just catching him isn't enough!@k@vS23/00/VTH_otaC1005. We've gotta get those school swimsuits back!@k@vS23/00/VTH_otaC1006. And to make him feel the same grief, we'll tear off Mr. Keiichi's trunks too!!"
""Strip him bare!! Rip them off!!@k@vS23/00/VTH_otaA1011|S23/00/VTH_otaB1008|S23/00/VTH_otaC1008. Strip him bare!! Rip them off!!""
"I-I know we need all the manpower we can get, but these people are the absolute worst..."
"...Meep~! And with that, we've assembled a massive army of allies."
"Mii-chaaan!!@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1063. Look, look! With this many people, there's no way we can lose!!"
"All right, let's go, everyone!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1132. All hands, chaaarge!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1133. Follow meeeee!!"
"...Heh, hehehehe!!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11183. Looks like the magic in these trunks is the real deal!!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11184. If the trials are this intense, then the payoff must be worth it!!"
"Wait, what the hell is going on?@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11186. Just how many people are chasing me now?!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11187. Whoa?!"
"Hold on a moment, Maebara-kun.@k@|@y@vS23/09/VTH_takano1011. Hee hee, let big sis give you a nice, gentle injection..."

"Whoa, close call!!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11189. So Takano-san has been possessed by the grudge of the unpopular guys too!!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11190. She must be serious if she's throwing syringes at me!"

"Hee hee hee!@k@|@y@vS23/09/VTH_takano1013. They promised to let me into the ritual storehouse if I catch you.@k@|@y@vS23/09/VTH_takano1014. So be a dear and sacrifice yourself to sate my intellectual curiosity, won't you?@k@vS23/09/VTH_takano1015. Here, here, here!!"
"Wah, whoa, gyah!!@|@y@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11192. P-p-please pick up all those syringes you just threw!!"
"Wait, what the?!@|@y@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11194. Now it's T-square rulers?!"
"Maebara-kun, it's time for you to reflect on your sins.@k@|@y@vS23/22/VTH_chie1012. Now!! Cease this blasphemy against curry and repent for your foolishness immediately!!"
"Wh-why are you accusing me of blaspheming curry?!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11196. Whoa! Stop throwing those rulers!!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11197. Uah, gah?! Gyah!!"
"Guarding is pointless!@k@vS23/22/VTH_chie1014. My throws have guard-break properties, you know!!@k@vS23/22/VTH_chie1015. Now, brace yourself!!"
"Uwah, eep, gyaaah!!@|@y@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11199. Just how many T-square rulers did you bring?!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11200. Ow ow ow!!"
"Oh dear, you're completely soaked from playing in the pool!@k@vS23/06/VTH_shion1014. Which means the most effective weapon would be this.@k@vS23/06/VTH_shion1015. Isn't that right, Kei-chan?!"
"Y-you too, Shion?!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11202. Hey, a stun gun is no joke in this situation!!!"

"I couldn't care less if you turn into some wacky narcissist, Kei-chan!@k@|@y@vS23/06/VTH_shion1017. But I'm doing this for my sweet sister!!@k@|@y@vS23/06/VTH_shion1018. Trust me, it'll hurt less if you just give in quietly!!"
"Hurt less?! That thing could stop my heart!!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11204. You're absolutely ruthless!!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11205. That's it -- I'm getting out of this pool!"
"Hanyuu!"
"Red light!"

"...Now, while he's frozen, I'll just turn Keiichi around... maybe toward the pool...@k@|@y@vS23/12/VTH_hanyu1027. ...No, the pool's too far. I'll point him at this wall instead... Heave-ho, heave-ho."
"...Okay, release!"
"Hahaha!"
"N-not again?!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11209. I was sure I was heading for the exit!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11210. And why is there a mysterious stone monolith right in front of me?? ...Whoa!"
changeReason: Old translation rendered 謎の as 'huge' but 謎 means 'mysterious'; new translation correctly says 'mysterious stone monolith.'

TextENGNew: "Gah, I'm blinded?!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11212. Did someone just snipe me with a water gun?!"
"Forget about me already, Kei-chan?!@k@|@y@vS23/03/VTH_mion1135. Now, Rena -- take him home!!"
"Sorry, sorry!!@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1065. Keiichi-kun's trunks -- I'm taking them hooooome!!"
"Like hell you are!! Raaaah!!"
"Haha! I already predicted you'd dive into the lazy river!!"
"Heh heh heh! Even if you saw it coming, there's nothing you can do!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11215. With the current giving me a speed boost, there's no way you can catch me!!"
"...Wait, the lazy river is always packed. Why is it completely empty?@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11217. Hold on... what the? Are those dorsal fins?"
"Whooooaaaaaaa!!!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11219. I-i-is that a whole school of hammerhead shaaaarks?!"

"Oh ho ho ho ho!!@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1053. I told you, didn't I? We already predicted you'd jump into the lazy river!@k@|@y@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1054. Now then, enjoy a lovely game of chase with these positively adorable sharks!!"
"Heh, hehehe! S-Satoko, did you know?!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11221. Only a few species of sharks actually attack people. Most of them are docile and completely harmless!!"
"Oh, is that so?@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1056. Then why not let them catch up to you?@k@|@y@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1057. By the way, I'm told these particular sharks haven't eaten in three days!"

"G-GUOOOOOOOOOOO!!!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11223. Swim, swim, Keiichi Maebara!!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11224. This is a trial! Keep swimming and swimming until the day you become irresistible!!!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11225. B-but they're fish! I can't outswim them in the water!!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11226. I-I've got to find a chance to get back on land!!"
"...Meep. The swimsuit thief is climbing out, completely exhausted."
"There he is!!@|@y@k@vS23/00/VTH_otaA1013. You've lost our respect, Comrade Keiichi!!"
"R-real-life swimsuit thieves are th-the absolute worst!!"
"...Y-you say that, but could you do something about those jealous, longing looks on your faces?!"
"...If you manage to get Keiichi's trunks off, I might even throw in a signed photo with my school swimsuit. Nipah~☆."
changeReason: New translation adds 'signed' (not in the Japanese 写真つき which just means 'with a photo'); changes meaning from accompanying photo to autographed photo.

TextENGNew: "YEEEAAAH!!! Long live Her Majesty Rika Furude, the shining star of Angel Mort!!!"
"Whoaaaa, you're resorting to human wave tactics?!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11229. Bring it onnnnn!!!"

"Heh heh heh!! How do you like that, Kei-chan?!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1138. It doesn't matter how huge these pool grounds are!@k@|@y@vS23/03/VTH_mion1139. You can't possibly think you can keep running forever against this many people?!"
"H-hau~!@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1067. At this rate they're definitely going to get Keiichi-kun's trunks off, and his smooth skin will come tumbling out~!! Hau hau hau~!!"

"Oh ho ho ho!! The sweet satisfaction of crushing a single foe with an entire army!!@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1059. Keiichi-san is completely alone and without allies!! No matter how hard he struggles, it's only a matter of time!!"
Grr...! If there were even a few less of them, I could keep dodging all day... b-but this many is really pushing it...
If they all piled on at once, it wouldn't even be a fight -- I'd be crushed under the sheer weight and numbers!
"...If this massive group jumped me in broad daylight and ripped my trunks off in front of all these people, I'd be a laughingstock for the rest of my life...!!"

"Heh heh heh! I'd say it's about time you started praying, Kei-chan.@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1141. Don't worry, even after they strip you I've got a nice fresh pair of trunks all ready for you.@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1142. Ehehehehehe!"
"Whoa, Sis, you're really going to make him wear these?!@k@vS23/06/VTH_shion1020. That's brutal... Hehehehe!!"
Sh-shit~~!!
Losing out on the ladies' man magic...@k@rwould be a little disappointing, sure, but I could live with it!
...But,@k@rhaving my trunks torn off in front of this huge crowd,@k@rin an act of pure humiliation,@k@rand then being forced into those swan trunks?!@k@rThat is absolutely, positively, unacceptable!!
...And yet, just as Mion suggested,@k@rI found myself quietly praying...
No matter how calmly I assessed the situation,@k@rthis was total, complete checkmate...
It was only a matter of time before my trunks were pulled down...
So all I could do@k@rwas mentally prepare myself,@k@rto at least soften the psychological blow...@k@r...Damn...dammit...!!
